creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: In case it wasn't clear, I did the original for two reasons. First, I didn't want to blow up my root on my laptop. I also didn't want to bump up yhe 64MB CF card to a 1GB CF card. The move to /usr/lib fixes 1, but not 2. I stopped using it for my laptop long ago, but still used it for nanobsd...
